name: recoverable-empty-state
title: Recoverable Empty State
description: A recoverable empty state explains why expected content is absent and gives the user the most direct next action. It distinguishes first-use emptiness, no search results, filtered-out content, permission limits, and load failures instead of showing one generic illustration for every cause.
docs: Recipe contract (intent/anatomy/tokens/checks/anti-patterns): https://ui.askewly.com/llms/recipes/feedback/recoverable-empty-state.md — after transplant, remap look to the project's own tokens per https://ui.askewly.com/llms/docs/design-system/component-restyle.md
